title: 00042_Learning_GFlowNets_From_Partial_Episodes_For_Improved_Convergence_And_Stability
positive_examples: SubTB(𝜆) improves convergence of GFlowNets in previously studied environments, allowing for faster learning and better performance in tasks such as molecule generation and sequence generation.

SubTB(𝜆) enables training of GFlowNets in environments with longer action sequences and sparser reward landscapes, which can lead to advancements in fields like drug discovery and biological sequence design.
